Terrible gas station, very bad service, long lines to fill up and they only fill from one side, plus they don't warn you, they tell you when you're about to fill up that you have to wait in line, I waited half an hour

reviews.comment:
60 minutos de espera, 4 surtidores y 2 playeros, la gente va con su vehículo y varios bidones lo que hace mas larga la espera.
Traigan bidones y no entren a chos malal. Usen la circunvalación qué es nueva y después de años la terminaro.
En Adacollo esta el Modulo de abastecimiento social de combustible  tiene marca YPF y los combustible premian y en las Ovejas marca PUMA.

(Translated by Google)
A 60-minute wait, 4 pumps and 2 attendants. People arrive with their vehicles and several jerrycans, which makes the wait even longer.
Bring your own jerrycans and don't go into Chos Malal. Use the bypass; it's new and was finally finished after years.
In Adacollo, there's a social fuel distribution center with YPF stations and premium fuel prices, and in Las Ovejas, it's PUMA.

reviewReply.comment: Lamentablemente la cola es larga. Y también siempre en horarios picos hay 3 playeros

reviews.comment:
Impecable atención!
Los baños muy limpios y el sanitario para discapacitados siempre disponible, aunque a veces hay que pedir la llave.
Sí hay que tener paciencia para cargar combustible porque hay mucha demanda y hay que esperar
La full que funciona allí muy buena atención también

(Translated by Google)
Impeccable service!
The restrooms are very clean, and the accessible restroom is always available, although sometimes you have to ask for the key.
You do need to be patient when getting fuel because there's a lot of demand and you have to wait. The full-service station there also has excellent service.
